content: Finding a small mistake in a large spreadsheet after searching for hours.
Presenting a bold new idea to a group of skeptical bosses.
Serving food to people in need at a busy local shelter.
Sanding a wooden table by hand until it is completely smooth.
Building a custom computer from separate parts.
Organizing a protest to stand up for a cause.
Studying market trends to predict cryptocurrency changes.
Writing a script to automate a boring, repetitive task.
Hiking a difficult mountain trail to watch the sunrise.
Teaching a new coworker and helping them learn the job.
Adjusting the layout of a website to make it look perfect.
Negotiating a major contract to get the best price.
Performing a solo musical act on stage.
Solving a difficult puzzle that others gave up on.
Coaching a children's sports team to play together.
Designing a watering system to help a dry village.
Working quickly in a busy hospital emergency room.
Selecting and arranging art pieces for an exhibition.
Going on a spontaneous road trip without a planned destination.
Reading a contract carefully to find hidden details.
Finding glitches and bugs while testing a new virtual reality game.
Repairing a leaky sink faucet on your own.
Running a high-pressure campaign to help a politician win.
Searching through ancient archives to find missing historical details.
Running a full marathon.
Making a short online video that explains a hard topic simply.
Designing highly detailed, intricate jewelry.
Listening to others and helping them with their feelings.
Doing math to make sure a tall building can survive strong winds.
Starting a small business with very little money to see if it grows.
Drawing the plans for a new subway system.
Training a service dog to help a person with a disability.
Hosting a large dinner party and making sure guests are happy.
Analyzing a computer virus to build a better security system.
Writing an essay about how to improve the school system.
Staying up late in a lab to watch a science experiment.
Asking a landlord to lower the rent for a local charity.
Designing a logo that will be seen by millions of people.
Repairing an airplane engine quickly under pressure.
Putting money into a new company that others think is too risky.
Planning a large outdoor music festival.
Following a long routine to take care of your skin.
Working to make a medicine that saves lives, despite many failures.
Cooking quickly in a highly rated, busy kitchen.
Keeping a daily list of all the food and calories you eat.
Leading a team underwater to search for a sunken ship.
Decorating a room to make it look beautiful and neat.
Building a robot that can help doctors perform precise medical operations.
Winning a debate even when arguing a side you disagree with.
Helping someone learn how to read.
Building a motorcycle and riding it across the country.
Programming a computer to write its own poetry.
Painting a large colorful picture on a city wall.
Directing a movie and carefully planning how each scene looks.
Using space photos to see where trees are cut down illegally.
Organizing supplies and transport to help after a natural disaster.
Learning an ancient, unused language to read old books.
Designing running shoes for professional athletes.

Living alone in a hand-built cabin in the woods for a month.
